title: PTRQ Method, Spel Class
syntax: Function PTRQ (JointNumber As Integer) As Single
parameters: JointNumber	Integer expression from 1-9 representing the joint number.
description: Returns the peak torque for the specified joint.
see_also:
ATCLR, ATRQ, PTCLR

PTRQ Example

VB Example:

Dim peakTorque As Single

peakTorque = m_spel.PTRQ(1)

C# Example:

float peakTorque;

peakTorque = m_spel.PTRQ(1);
examples:
Dim peakTorque As Single
peakTorque = m_spel.PTRQ(1)
